description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages lint, test, and chore and set the variable GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY to recursive. In the lint stage add a check-format job using the cppit/jucipp:arch image that runs the following commands: find src -name "*.cpp" -exec clang-format --Werror --assume-filename={} {} -n 2>> lint-errors.txt \; ; find src -name "*.hpp" -exec clang-format --Werror --assume-filename={} {} -n 2>> lint-errors.txt \; ; find tests -name "*.cpp" -exec clang-format --Werror --assume-filename={} {} -n 2>> lint-errors.txt \; ; find tests -name "*.hpp" -exec clang-format --Werror --assume-filename={} {} -n 2>> lint-errors.txt \; ; HAS_ERRORS=$(cat lint-errors.txt | wc -l) ; '[ "$HAS_ERRORS" == "0" ] || cat lint-errors.txt' ; '[ "$HAS_ERRORS" == "0" ]'. In the test stage add address-sanitizer (image cppit/jucipp:arch) running: mkdir build && cd build ; CXXFLAGS="-fsanitize=address" cmake -DBUILD_TESTING=1 .. ; make -j$(nproc) ; broadwayd & CTEST_OUTPUT_ON_FAILURE=1 LSAN_OPTIONS=detect_leaks=0 make test; arch (image cppit/jucipp:arch) running the shared script: mkdir build && cd build ; CXXFLAGS="-D_GLIBCXX_ASSERTIONS" cmake -DBUILD_TESTING=1 .. ; make -j$(nproc) ; broadwayd & CTEST_OUTPUT_ON_FAILURE=1 make test; debian (image cppit/jucipp:debian) running the same shared script; debian-testing (image cppit/jucipp:debian-testing) running the same shared script; fedora (image cppit/jucipp:fedora) running the same shared script; ubuntu (image cppit/jucipp:ubuntu) running the same shared script; undefined-sanitizer (image cppit/jucipp:arch) running: mkdir build && cd build ; CXXFLAGS="-fsanitize=undefined" cmake -DBUILD_TESTING=1 .. ; make -j$(nproc) ; broadwayd & CTEST_OUTPUT_ON_FAILURE=1 make test; static-analysis (image cppit/jucipp:arch) running: mkdir build && cd build ; scan-build cmake .. ; scan-build --status-bugs make -j$(nproc); thread-safety-analysis (image cppit/jucipp:arch) running: mkdir build && cd build ; CXX=clang++ CXXFLAGS=-Werror cmake .. ; make -j$(nproc). Finally, in the chore stage add a manual Clean appveyor cache job that runs: curl -H "Authorization: Bearer v2.${APPVEYOR_TOKEN}" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -X "DELETE" https://ci.appveyor.com/api/projects/zalox/jucipp-oisms/buildcache.
